title: LinkCam - Episode 6
description:
Ehm.. The King got a new video camera for Christmas. Now he wants to make videos of himself doing what he thinks is funny. The camera is called "LinkCam" and is made by some Sony wanna be s. Link is mostly the cameraman..
-
-
-Link hates to be recorded on camera.
-
Now, THIS is the last one for a while.
